introSection: Zeeslang was a steel kiddie roller coaster located at DippieDoe Attractiepark in the Netherlands. It opened in 2005 and closed in 2013.

sections.title: Color scheme
sections.content: Red track and white supports. The ride featured green track and supports at Hellendoorn.

fullText:
Zeeslang was a steel kiddie roller coaster located at DippieDoe Attractiepark in the Netherlands. It opened in 2005 and closed in 2013.



Red track and white supports. The ride featured green track and supports at Hellendoorn.
